amber.label: AMBER
amber.meaning: current but incomplete, stale soon, or warning-level drift

grey.label: GREY
grey.meaning: unknown, not wired, or not yet observed

blue.label: BLUE
blue.meaning: frozen, manually held, or review state

nodeRules.description: Repository does not expose federation.yaml or federation.yml. Not fully federated yet.
Repository appears to be a data repo but DATA_CONTRACT.md is missing.
Repository has no GitHub Actions workflow detected.
Repository is archived or intentionally frozen.

controlPlaneRules.description: Do not trigger workflows from the ledger until workflow target, accepted inputs, output expectations and audit logging are declared.
